channel.title: Coding on Nilam's Page
channel.description: Recent content in Coding on Nilam's Page

item.title: Getting Started with MIT Scratch: A Parent's Guide
item.description: Getting Started with MIT Scratch: A Parent’s Guide MIT Scratch is one of the best tools to introduce children to the world of coding. It’s visual, intuitive, and most importantly - fun! What is Scratch? Scratch is a block-based visual programming language developed by MIT Media Lab. Instead of typing complex code, kids drag and drop colorful blocks to create: 🎮 Interactive games 🎬 Animated stories 🎵 Music and sound projects 🤖 Simple simulations Why Scratch is Perfect for Kids 1.

item.title: Welcome to Learner's Paradise
item.description: Welcome to Learner’s Paradise Hello and welcome to my blog! I’m Nilam Patil, a passionate STEM and Tech Educator with 6+ years of experience teaching students worldwide. I specialize in helping learners aged 6-18 discover the joy of coding, robotics, and game development. 🎯 Courses I Offer Check out my Courses section for detailed information, or explore them below: 🎮 Roblox Game Development Master Lua scripting and create your own 3D games!
